News - Entertainment | ResetEra","content":"‘Alien: Romulus’ sequel script is complete, but Fede Álvarez will not direct.
The 2025 Games of the Year results are in!
Fede Álvarez and Rodo Sayagues have completed a script for the sequel to last year's Alien: Romulus, but Álvarez won't be in the director's chair this time around.
Álvarez plans to helm an original film he wrote with Sayagues.
Cailee Spaeny and David Jonsson, who starred in Alien: Romulus as brave colonist Rain Carradine and her synthetic brother Andy, respectively, are expected to reprise their roles in the sequel.
After what happened with Don't Breathe 2 I really hope this isn't Rodo picking up the helm.
Let Dan Trachtenberg have a go, he's already doing good things with Predator and he can then make things line up for AvP too.
Romulus' direction was good, I just hope that sequel script takes more risks.
Evil Dead, Don't Breathe, now this.
GET NOAH HAWLEY and have him rewrite the script."},{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2025/09/05/fede-alvarez-wont-be-directing-the-alien-romulus-sequel/","title":"Fede Álvarez Reveals He Won’t Be Directing The Alien: Romulus Sequel!","content":"Now, while talking to TooFab on the red carpet at Universal Studios Halloween Horror Nights in Hollywood, he let the public know that he won’t be directing the sequel.
> Lex being the protagonist of AVP but not even being mentioned in AVP-R.
> And now Rain and Andy will probably get the same treatment since Fede is not directing the next movie.
Fede wanted David in the sequel but Ridley said no because he's planning his own Alien movie with Fassbender.
Sneider has heard that Fede and Ridley fought over the casting of Michael Fassbender.
And if she's also connected to Fox, it's not a bad choice.
I thought he'd be as attached to the franchise as Dan Trachtenberg was to Predator.
He even hinted at plans for an AvP in some interviews.
Their schedules won't stop until this project gets underway (I think Cailee was confirmed for Elden Ring, whose pre-production was set to begin shortly).
Cailee Spaeny was attached to*Elden Ring*whether Fede was directing this or not."}]}

(Photo by Antony Jones/Getty Images for The Walt Disney Company Limited). Fede Alvarez, who reinvigorated the “Alien” franchise on the big screen last year with “Alien: Romulus,” won’t be returning for the sequel, he revealed. Speaking to TooFab, Alvarez said he will stay on as a producer for the “Alien: Romulus” sequel, but he and franchise creator Ridley Scott will search for a new director. “We just finished the script, actually, for a sequel for ‘Romulus.’ But I’m going to pass the torch on this one as director,” he told TooFab. “I’m going to produce it, with Ridley Scott. We’re going to produce it together and we’re right now trying to find a new filmmaker to come in.”. ### Popular on Variety. We love the story and now we just want to find a director that really wants to go for the jugular.”.","score":0.8497846,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2025/09/05/fede-alvarez-wont-be-directing-the-alien-romulus-sequel","title":"Fede Alvarez Reveals He Won't Be Directing The Alien: Romulus Sequel!","content":"As we've recently reported, the script is done and the plan was Fede Álvarez to start shooting this October. he won't be directing the sequel.","score":0.8412138,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/alien-romulus-sequel-fede-alvarez-1236362496","title":"Fede Alvarez Will Not Direct 'Alien: Romulus' Sequel","content":"The filmmaker and co-writer Rodo Sayagues have completed a script, and now he and producer Ridley Scott are on the hunt for a new director.","score":0.818055,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.threads.com/@culturecrave/post/DOO0VWCAUGh/fede-%C3%A1lvarez-confirms-hes-not-directing-the-alien-romulus-sequel-script-is-done-?hl=en","title":"Fede Álvarez confirms he's not directing the 'Alien: Romulus' sequel","content":"Fede Álvarez confirms he's not directing the 'Alien: Romulus' sequel. • Script is done. • He's producing it with Ridley Scott","score":0.8058924,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/LV426/comments/1n9bzng/fede_%C3%A1lvarez_will_not_direct_alien_romulus_sequel","title":"Fede Álvarez Will Not Direct 'Alien: Romulus' Sequel : r/LV426","content":"He says he and co-writer Rodo Sayagues are done with the script, and have also written a different script they want to prioritize instead, but","score":0.7467494,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.86,"request_id":"2f27a8a6-7a9b-4a3c-bb2c-71432ada68d8"}
